name: Sportsfield Co., Ltd.
summary: Sportsfield Co., Ltd. engages in the recruitment support business in Japan. It is involved in the planning and operation of Sponavi joint employment seminars and Sponavi bytes; planning and management of Sponavi agent, employment site, Sponavi career, and Sponavi intern; management of Sponavi shop; and employment guidance, education and training, and recruitment consulting, and subsidy consulting businesses. The company was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
